streams.h
Go to the documentation of this file.
1
18#ifndef MEDIA_C_STREAMS_H_
19#define MEDIA_C_STREAMS_H_
20
21#include "list.h"
22#include "stream.h"
23
24#ifdef __cplusplus
25extern "C" {
26#endif
27
37typedef list_t streams_t;
38
44static inline streams_t* streams_new(size_t initial_capacity) { return list_new(initial_capacity, sizeof(stream_t)); }
45
51static inline void streams_free(streams_t* streams, void (*free_func)(void*)) { list_free(streams, free_func); }
52
59static inline bool streams_add(streams_t* streams, stream_t* stream) { return list_add(streams, stream); }
60
67static inline stream_t* streams_get(const streams_t* streams, size_t index) {
68 return (stream_t*)list_get(streams, index);
69}
70
76static inline size_t streams_size(const streams_t* streams) { return streams->size; }
77
83static inline size_t streams_capacity(const streams_t* streams) { return streams->capacity; }
84
90static inline bool streams_empty(const streams_t* streams) { return streams->size == 0U; }
91
98static inline stream_t* streams_find(const streams_t* streams, const char* name) {
99 stream_t* result = NULL;
100 for (size_t i = 0; i < streams->size; ++i) {
101 stream_t* stream = (stream_t*)list_get(streams, i);
102 if (strcmp(stream->name, name) == 0) {
103 result = stream;
104 break;
105 }
106 }
107 return result;
108}
109
115static inline void streams_clear(streams_t* streams, void (*free_func)(void*)) { list_clear(streams, free_func); }
116
122static inline void streams_inspect(const streams_t* streams, int (*print_func)(const char*, ...)) {
123 (void)print_func("Streams:\n");
124 for (size_t i = 0; i < streams->size; ++i) {
125 const stream_t* stream = streams_get(streams, i);
126 stream_inspect(stream, print_func, "\t");
127 }
128}
129
130#ifdef __cplusplus
131}
132#endif
133
134#endif // MEDIA_C_STREAMS_H_

Generic dynamic array (list) container.

static bool list_add(list_t *list, void *item)
Append an item to the list, growing it if necessary.
